title: Commission refuses to ‘open or amend’ methane regulation
summary_full: Brussels insists forthcoming recommendations, notably on setting penalties, will be enough to head off any threat to Europe's gas supplies
summary_public: Brussels insists forthcoming recommendations, notably on setting penalties, will be enough to head off any threat to Europe's gas supplies
